Want to Start Vibe Coding? The Fundamentals Beginners Should Get Down First

Lately a lot of friends have been asking me, "I want to use AI to build things too — where do I start?" And what they're really asking about is Vibe Coding. This post is about the fundamentals beginners should get down before diving into Vibe Coding — Git, command line, UI Frameworks, and so on. So you don't get halfway through and find you're stuck not knowing how to communicate with the AI.
Heard of LLM, RAG, Prompt? A Quick Guide to Common Generative AI Terms

Generative AI isn't just engineer territory anymore — it's seeping into our daily lives. If you use ChatGPT, Grok, Midjourney, or similar tools, these technical terms will start showing up in your world. If you're an engineer, I'd highly recommend understanding them — future development will lean even more on these technologies to build better products.
A Fun Little Game — Gandalf Adventures Prompt Injection Walkthrough

For people designing AI tools, the Prompt is really important — it determines what the AI says back. There happens to be a little game called "Gandalf Adventures" that's all about Prompt Injection, so I figured I'd also write up a walkthrough.
